negative_variants.description: Analog Primitive Resistor Instance: instantiates a resistor primitive, but uses .r(1.0) instead of the required 1000.0 ohm value.
Analog Primitive Resistor Instance: instantiates the correct primitive shape, but uses .r(10000.0) and fails the required value contract.
Analog Primitive Resistor Instance: instantiates the correct primitive shape, but uses .r(500.0) and fails the required value contract.
Analog Primitive Resistor Instance: instantiates the correct primitive shape, but uses .r(1500.0) and fails the required value contract.
Analog Primitive Resistor Instance: instantiates the correct primitive shape, but uses .r(800.0) and fails the required value contract.
